title: Gendo Ikari glasses
wikitext:
[]: Gendo Ikari glasses?             Quote Post by Travosaga » Thu Apr 07, 2011 4:08 pm So I'm really dying to get my hands on a pair of gendo ikari sunglasses. I know the gainax store sells them, but I can't even read the page and I'm not too sure they would ship to the U.S. anyway. Does anybody know a way I can get a legitimate pair?

[]:             Quote Post by Mordicaii » Thu Apr 07, 2011 7:57 pm Aside from making them (which I've tried), I can't really think of a way. Can you link me to the page to which you are referencing?

[]:             Quote Post by Travosaga » Thu Apr 07, 2011 8:05 pm Sure. Here is a link to the glasses in the gainax store. They also sell both Mari's and Misato's as well. http://www2.gainax.co.jp/eva/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=3475

[]: Re: Gendo Ikari glasses?             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Apr 07, 2011 8:38 pm Travosaga wrote: So I'm really dying to get my hands on a pair of gendo ikari sunglasses. I know the gainax store sells them, but I can't even read the page and I'm not too sure they would ship to the U.S. anyway.

[]: Re: Gendo Ikari glasses?             Quote Post by Travosaga » Thu Apr 07, 2011 9:35 pm symbv wrote: The page on Shipping stated that it does not ship overseas. For address in Japan it must not be a postbox address either and the shipping charge is always 472 yen per piece.

[]: Re: Gendo Ikari glasses?             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Apr 07, 2011 9:42 pm Travosaga wrote: Ah man, what a bummer. I wonder why they don't ship overseas? Surely they must know that there is a sizable market in the west for this kind of stuff. I would buy a pair right now if I could.

[]:             Quote Post by Travosaga » Thu Apr 07, 2011 9:50 pm Oh yeah cool. Do you have to have a special JP account to purchase from the jp amazon site? I've never used it before, just the american version. Edit: Never mind, I figured it out. It appears they still won't ship outside of Japan even through amazon.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Apr 07, 2011 10:40 pm Travosaga wrote: Oh yeah cool. Do you have to have a special JP account to purchase from the jp amazon site? I've never used it before, just the american version. Edit: Never mind, I figured it out. It appears they still won't ship outside of Japan even through amazon.

[]:             Quote Post by Travosaga » Fri Apr 08, 2011 12:11 am Hah, I actually sent one too saying that I was interested and shipping cost wasn't a concern. I had to use google translator though so who knows how that will work out. I do appreciate your help.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Apr 08, 2011 5:02 am I just got the reply from the retailer that is using Amazon JP to sell their stuff. They said they would only ship CD, DVD or books overseas but not other things, glasses included. Oh well.

[]:             Quote Post by Travosaga » Fri Apr 08, 2011 8:30 am They sent me a reply as well. I haven't had a chance to translate it yet since I'm viewing from my phone. There was a link included though that took me to a website that actually DOES sell and ship to the united states. It's all translated direct from Japanese so the language is a bit off, but it appears I'll be able to get my glasses. I'll have to take care of it when I get home and thank that retailer for pointing me in the right direction.

[]:             Quote Post by lrichil » Thu May 16, 2013 11:46 am Sorry to revive an old post but I do want to know if anyone was able to buy those. I'm sying for those glasses hahaha.

[]:             Quote Post by Veefy » Fri May 17, 2013 6:48 am lrichil wrote: Sorry to revive an old post but I do want to know if anyone was able to buy those. I'm sying for those glasses hahaha.
